entities.name: Higher-ed playbook
entities.context: Codified pattern for approaching higher education institutions with a specific strategy

entities.name: Free or low-friction pilots
entities.context: Strategy of starting engagements with easy, no-cost trials before formal commitments

entities.name: Alumni employers
entities.context: Identified as the real leverage point in the higher-ed strategy, not the institutions themselves

entities.name: Universities
entities.context: Target institutions for the higher-ed playbook, to be triaged by leverage potential

entities.name: Communities
entities.context: Target groups alongside universities, to be evaluated for needle-moving potential

entities.name: Workload triage
entities.context: Practice of periodically evaluating which targets genuinely move the needle and pausing low-leverage asks

relationships.context: Pilots are a core component of the playbook pattern
Alumni employers identified as the real leverage point in the strategy
Universities are the target institutions for the playbook
